allow: Bash(cd /d D:\\homestay3\\homestay-backend && dir logs 2>/dev/null || echo "No logs directory")

Bash(mysql -uroot -p111111 -h localhost homestay_db -e "
-- 查看退款中的订单
SELECT o.id, o.order_number, o.payment_status, o.status, o.total_amount
FROM orders o 
WHERE o.payment_status = 'REFUND_PENDING';

-- 查看这些订单的支付记录
SELECT pr.order_id, pr.out_trade_no, pr.transaction_id, pr.status, pr.amount
FROM payment_records pr 
WHERE pr.order_id IN \(SELECT id FROM orders WHERE payment_status = 'REFUND_PENDING'\);
")

Bash(mysql -uroot -p111111 -h localhost homestay_db -e "
-- 查看支付记录的创建时间
SELECT id, order_id, out_trade_no, transaction_id, status, created_at 
FROM payment_records 
WHERE order_id = 119
ORDER BY created_at DESC;
")
